Calculate the Highest Density Region

Source: R/hdr.R
calc_hdr.Rd

calc_hdr() calculates the highest density region (HDR) from a numeric vector containing posterior samples

Usage

calc_hdr(vec_x, probs = c(0.5, 0.87, 0.99))

Arguments

vec_x

A numeric vector containing the posterior samples

probs

A numeric vector with the probabilities for the credible intervals which defaults to probs = c(0.50, 0.87, 0.99)

Value

A named numeric matrix containing the credible intervals

On this page
